series_metadata.series_title: Safety & Hygiene Injury, Occupational Illness and Accident Statistical Records – Ad Hoc Research
series_metadata.series_description: This schedule relates to the collection and compilation of statistical data regarding the cause and prevention of injuries, occupational illnesses and accidents to employees. The Ad Hoc category consists of data files and summary results for a single policy, single answer or similar situation. Also included are quickly repeatable compilations to supply an answer that will not need to be referred to after the result is provided.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 3 years, and then destroy., Electronic: Delete
